title: Upon Letcher. Epig.
content:
Letcher was carted first about the streets,
    For false position in his neighbour's sheets:
    Next, hanged for thieving: now the people say,
    His carting was the prologue to this play.
meaning:
"Upon Letcher. Epig." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
